boston-childrens-museum.booking_note: After getting library coupon, book Half Price Library Timed Tickets on bostonchildrensmuseum.org.

museum-of-science.booking_note: Advance tickets recommended; weekends/holidays often sell out (mos.org).

new-england-aquarium.booking_note: Advance timed tickets strongly recommended; capacity-limited (neaq.org).

zoo-new-england.booking_note: Walk-in OK; show $9/$6 library voucher at gate.

discovery-museum.booking_note: Reservations no longer required; show pass at admissions desk.

mass-audubon.booking_note: Show pass at sanctuary entrance; closed Mondays at most sites.

north-shore-childrens-museum.booking_note: Online ticket reservation strongly encouraged due to capacity (nschildrensmuseum.org).

ecotarium.booking_note: Walk-in OK; closed Mondays except Monday holidays.

uss-constitution-museum.booking_note: Walk-in; show pass at admission desk. Ship closed Mon–Tue.

harvard-museums.booking_note: Show physical pass + MA residency proof at admissions; no online booking.

plimoth-patuxet.booking_note: Seasonal: closed Dec–Mar; reopens for 2026 season through Sun after Thanksgiving.

butterfly-place.booking_note: Open seasonally Valentine's Day–Columbus Day; walk-in, no reservation needed.

davis-farmland.booking_note: Open Apr–Oct only; walk-in tickets at gate; closed Mon/Tue.

childrens-piazza.booking_note: Must book open-play slot on thechildrenspiazza.com after getting library pass.

einsteins-workshop.booking_note: Drop-in only Sat/Sun. No reservation needed; show library pass at door.

sandmagination.booking_note: Advance tickets recommended esp. on vacation weeks (sandmagination.com).

aviation-museum-nh.booking_note: Walk-in during posted hours; show pass at door.

american-heritage-museum.booking_note: Walk-in OK; bring pass to admissions desk. Tank rides require separate booking.

naismith-basketball-hof.booking_note: Walk-in; closed Mondays (except select holidays). Show pass at door.

patriots-hall-of-fame.booking_note: Walk-in; closed Thanksgiving/Christmas/Easter & some private events.

boston-by-foot.booking_note: Public tours run Apr–Nov; advance registration required (bostonbyfoot.org).

boston-harbor-islands.booking_note: Ferry runs May–Oct; reserve discounted ferry tickets via promo code/online.

mfa.booking_note: Use library promo code on mfa.org to redeem $10–$15 timed-entry tickets.

isabella-stewart-gardner.booking_note: After getting library promo code, book timed slot on gardnermuseum.org.

ica-boston.booking_note: Use $10 e-coupon code from library to book online at icaboston.org.

peabody-essex-museum.booking_note: After getting library promo code, book online at pem.org for $12 admission.

jfk-library.booking_note: Timed tickets recommended; drop-in admission also available (jfklibrary.org).

concord-museum.booking_note: Walk-in OK; no reservation needed. Closed Mon (open Mon holidays).

harvard-art-museums.booking_note: Free admission for everyone; walk-in. Closed Mondays.

house-of-seven-gables.booking_note: Timed-entry guided tours; book in advance on 7gables.org. No late arrivals.

salem-witch-museum.booking_note: Timed 30-min presentations every half-hour; book online at salemwitchmuseum.com.

historic-new-england.booking_note: Most properties require reserved guided tour; check property page on historicnewengland.org.

wenham-museum.booking_note: Walk-in OK; closed Sun/Mon/Tue. First Wed open til 6.

new-england-quilt-museum.booking_note: Walk-in OK; closed Sun/Mon. Group tours need 2-week advance booking.

new-england-botanic-garden.booking_note: Walk-in OK; show pass at admissions. Closed major holidays.

garden-in-the-woods.booking_note: Open seasonally mid-Apr–mid-Oct; walk-in OK during season.

gore-place.hours_summary: Mansion tours Mon, Wed, Fri, Sat
gore-place.booking_note: Guided mansion tours on the hour; walk-ins welcome. Grounds open dawn–dusk daily.

griffin-museum.booking_note: Walk-in OK; closed Mondays. Thursdays free admission.

paul-revere-house.booking_note: Walk-in self-guided tour; closed Mondays Jan–Mar.

royall-house.booking_note: Open Sat/Sun only, Jun–Oct; guided tours on the hour. Reserve for groups.

paddle-boston.booking_note: Walk-up rentals OK Apr–Oct; reservations available but not required.

trustees-of-reservations.booking_note: Show pass at gate; some sites need timed parking reservation in summer.

ma-state-parks.booking_note: Drive in and display ParkPass hangtag.

greater-boston-stage.booking_note: Book specific performance via box office; library pass for select shows.

merrimack-rep.booking_note: Book specific performance via mrt.org; advance booking required.

american-rep-theater.booking_note: Email ticketservices@amrep.org with library pass to claim 2 tickets to a show.

greenway-carousel.booking_note: Walk-up only at booth; peak daily mid-Apr–mid-Oct, weekends til Frostival.

mapparium.booking_note: Timed 20-min tour every 20 min; book ticket time at marybakereddylibrary.org.

larz-anderson.booking_note: Walk-in; show pass at door. Closed Mondays.

revolutionary-spaces.booking_note: Walk-in OK at Old State House & Old South Meeting House; show physical pass.

sandwich-glass.booking_note: Walk-in; show library pass at door for 50% off. Closed Jan.

boch-center.booking_note: Backstage tours by reservation only via Peek.com; use library coupon code.
